findings.title: BeyondTrust CVE-2026-1731 — Confirmed in Ransomware Attacks
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support (RS) & Privileged Remote Access (PRA)
findings.summary: CISA confirms ransomware exploitation; Unit 42 details web shells, C2, lateral movement across financial, legal, tech, healthcare sectors.

findings.title: Roundcube Webmail — Two Vulns Added to CISA KEV
findings.summary: XSS via SVG and deserialization RCE in Roundcube added to CISA KEV; chain enables full server compromise from email.

findings.title: LockBit 5.0 — Cross-Platform Ransomware Now Targeting Proxmox
findings.summary: LockBit 5.0 adds dedicated Proxmox builds targeting the increasingly popular open-source virtualization platform.

noted.summary: SSNs exposed via loan application bug for ~6 months.
Japanese chip testing giant hit by ransomware.
All clinics closed statewide after ransomware attack.
FBI reports $20M lost in 2025 from 700 Ploutus malware incidents.
